nodes.label: AI as validation and terminology tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for initial reasoning
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to take my rough idea and put proper names to the concepts I was using

nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant with context loss
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes the AI would lose context and I would then have to take my work and go to the openAI endpoint

nodes.label: AI for established procedures on exotic data
nodes.label_negative: AI for initial ideation and interpretation
nodes.grounding_span: If I have been handed data and told to analyze it but I don't know what established procedure is then I use AI to understand what I should do next

nodes.label: AI maintaining research context and goals
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring granular guidance and losing context
nodes.grounding_span: I wish it could catch on to the general theme of my research and help me investigate different angles better

nodes.label: Research ownership and intellectual connection
nodes.grounding_span: If I ask AI to suggest the starting point, then it isn't my project anymore and I find it hard to connect it to the research goal

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced cognitive overhead
nodes.grounding_span: Its almost easier to not use AI

nodes.label: Statistical validity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I still try to match bioinformatics commands with the documentation, just to ensure statistical validity

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for validation and terminology
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to take my rough idea and put proper names to the concepts I was using

nodes.label: Frustration with AI context loss and overhead
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes the AI would lose context and I would then have to take my work and go to the openAI endpoint

nodes.label: Conditional trust in AI for code execution
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to trust AI if the code is executing well

nodes.label: Desire for AI that maintains research context
nodes.grounding_span: I wish it could catch on to the general theme of my research and help me investigate different angles better

nodes.label: Backward reasoning from imagined endpoint
nodes.grounding_span: I start from an imagined endpoint and try to work on the individual steps backwards from there

nodes.label: Systematic verification through cross-referencing
nodes.grounding_span: I still try to match bioinformatics commands with the documentation, just to ensure statistical validity
